arts.ttl: 'I Spent Twelve Years at Manchester United - Ralf Rangnick Humiliated Me'
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Phil Jones once felt humiliated by interim boss Ralf Rangnick.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs. Man United: Andre Onana, Mason Mount decisions made as Red Devils confirm XI for King Power battle
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is passed fit for Sunday's Premier League clash against Leicester City at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Man United as Ruud van Nistelrooy stays true to his word
arts.sum: City (5-2-1-2): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Coady, Thomas, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; El Khannouss; Daka, Vardy. With no changes made, City’s defence will again see Wout Faes, Conor Coady and Luke Thomas for the heart of the back-line, with James Justin and Victor Kristiansen as wing-backs.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Manchester United - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Foxes name an unchanged XI from defeat at Chelsea, while Ruben Amorim makes three changes from his side that beat Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Leicester City host Manchester United at the King Power Stadium in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres responds to Man Utd links after coach's 'replaceable' message
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres insists that he has yet to be contacted over a summer transfer and that he remains fully focused on Sporting CP . Gyokeres responds to Man Utd links after coach's 'replaceable' message

arts.ttl: My Manchester United career was ended by worst coach ever - you won't believe what he told me
arts.sum: One former Manchester United player has opened up on how he left Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Manchester United double team news hint before Leicester City as Ruben Amorim faces big call
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to build on their midweek victory over Real Sociedad against Leicester City this evening

arts.ttl: EFL chief names new Manchester United stadium as potential League Cup final venue
arts.sum: Man United hope to open their new stadium in the 2030/31 season as they seek a move away from Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make Andre Onana contingency plan' with goalkeeper 'a major doubt' for Leicester clash
arts.sum: Dermot Mee could reportedly make his Manchester United debut against Leicester City, with Andre Onana viewed as a major doubt for the clash with the Foxes.

arts.ttl: Amorim Needs to Unleash 21-Year-Old Man Utd Star Immediately
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim must make use of Manchester United's younger stars now, with a view to the future - as the shape of the club looks to change in summer
